Class InputHandler

java.lang.Object
simcli.engine.InputHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
IInputHandler
public class InputHandler extends Object implements IInputHandler
Factory and dispatcher: maps raw user input to the right Command object.

Builds one shared CommandContext per turn, then instantiates the matching command. Never holds a reference to GameEngine — only the specific dependencies it needs (Dependency Inversion).

  • Constructor Details

    • InputHandler

      public InputHandler(IWorldManager worldManager, TimeManager timeManager, List<Sim> neighborhood, Consumer<Sim> setActivePlayer, SimulationLogger logger)
      Creates a new InputHandler.
      Parameters:
      worldManager - provides current location and city map.
      timeManager - provides time/day information.
      neighborhood - the full list of Sims in the household.
      setActivePlayer - callback to switch the active player on the engine.
      logger - the simulation logger for command messages.

  • Method Details

    • handle

      public CommandResult handle(String input, Sim activePlayer, Scanner scanner)
      Description copied from interface: IInputHandler
      Processes a single player command string.
      Specified by:
      handle in interface IInputHandler
      Parameters:
      input - the raw input string (already uppercased by the caller)
      activePlayer - the currently active Sim
      scanner - for reading follow-up user input inside sub-menus
      Returns:
      a CommandResult telling the engine what to do next
